name: Springans Booty
name_jp: スプリガンズ・ブーティー
desc: If a face-up Xyz Monster you control leaves the field by card effect: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; neither player can activate that Effect Monster's effects on the field this turn. You can send this face-up card to the GY; activate 1 "Great Sand Sea - Gold Golgonda" directly from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Springans Booty" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up Xyz Monster you control leaves the field by card effect: You can target 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls; neither player can activate that Effect Monster's effects on the field this turn. You can send this face-up card to the GY; activate 1 "Great Sand Sea - Gold Golgonda" directly from your Deck or GY. You can only use each effect of "Springans Booty" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
